# Feature Request

## Problem

What user problem are we solving?

## Proposed solution

What should happen?

## User path

Describe exactly what the user will do:

Example:
User enters two numbers → taps Add → sees result

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] User can complete flow without help
- [ ] No raw JSON required
- [ ] Works on mobile

## Category

CORE / API / UI / UX / TEST / UOR / DOC
